allow: PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine -match "server\\.js" } | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; $job = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\higor\\OneDrive\\Área de Trabalho\\higor baitola\\CRM\\backend" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $r = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3001/api/chips" -UseBasicParsing\).Content } catch { "ERRO" }; Write-Host "PID $\($job.Id\)"; Write-Host $r)
